option_line: bffi_mpBuyerHub3OptDemarch:"It may not be part of the League, but as a fellow executive of an independent colony..."
original: It may not be part of the League, but as a fellow executive of an independent colony...
translated: Ce n'est peut-être pas dans la Ligue, mais en tant que dirigeant d'une colonie indépendante...

option_line: bffi_mpBuyerHub3OptCommission:"My commissioned status with the Persean League must count for something."
original: My commissioned status with the Persean League must count for something.
translated: Mon statut de commissionné auprès de la Ligue Perséenne doit bien compter pour quelque chose.

option_line: bffi_mpBuyerHub3OptHorus:"Your cousin Horus Yaribay trusted me with his diplomatic credentials..."
original: Your cousin Horus Yaribay trusted me with his diplomatic credentials...
translated: Votre cousin Horus Yaribay m'a confié ses accréditations diplomatiques...

option_line: bffi_mpBuyerConChurch:"In fact, the Church is backing my purchase." (lie)
original: In fact, the Church is backing my purchase." (lie)
translated: En fait, l'Église soutient mon achat." (mensonge)

option_line: bffi_mpBuyerConChurchA:"Sorry, more spacer humor. The Church truly is backing my bid." (commit)
original: Sorry, more spacer humor. The Church truly is backing my bid." (commit)
translated: Désolé, encore de l'humour de spacien. L'Église soutient vraiment mon offre." (s'engager)

original:
He doesn't see the shock on Bornanew's face. "Is that so?" Menes asks, sounding pleased.

Bornanew quickly shakes his head, no, and makes a little cut-off motion with his hand.
translated:
Il ne voit pas le choc sur le visage de Bornanew. "Vraiment ?" demande Menes, d'un ton ravi.

Bornanew secoue rapidement la tête, non, et fait un petit geste de coupure avec sa main.

option_line: bffi_mpBuyerConChurchB:"No, no, just a little joke. My apologies." (back off)
original: No, no, just a little joke. My apologies." (back off)
translated: Non, non, juste une petite plaisanterie. Mes excuses." (reculer)

original:
As you commit to the lie, Bornanew gives you a look of absolute weariness.

Menes turns to him, "This is true? This is why you're here, isn't it. The backing of the Church, of course!"

"Yes," Bornanew says robotically, his attempt at a pleasant countenance looks like an appalling mask of pain.

Even Menes seems to sense something is off. "Are you feeling well, Knight?" he asks. "Perhaps you aren't used to the quality of drink I serve."
translated:
Tandis que vous vous engagez dans le mensonge, Bornanew vous lance un regard de lassitude absolue.

Menes se tourne vers lui : "C'est vrai ? C'est pour ça que vous êtes là, n'est-ce pas. Le soutien de l'Église, bien sûr !"

"Oui," dit Bornanew d'un ton robotique, sa tentative d'expression aimable ressemblant à un masque de douleur effroyable.

Même Menes semble sentir que quelque chose ne va pas. "Vous vous sentez bien, Chevalier ?" demande-t-il. "Peut-être n'êtes-vous pas habitué à la qualité des boissons que je sers."

original:
Bornanew closes his eyes, and you hear his sigh of relief.

Menes glances at him, giving a funny look, then back at you. "Ah, of course. Ha-ha." He clears his throat. "Odd folk, you spacers," he says as if to himself.
translated:
Bornanew ferme les yeux, et vous entendez son soupir de soulagement.

Menes lui jette un coup d'oeil, avec une drôle d'expression, puis se retourne vers vous. "Ah, bien sûr. Ha-ha." Il se racle la gorge. "Drôles de gens, vous les spaciens," dit-il comme pour lui-même.

original: Menes smirks, and holds out his TriPad, ready to accept your transfer code. Perhaps he feels like he's calling your bluff.
translated: Menes ricane et tend son TriPad, prêt à accepter votre code de transfert. Peut-être pense-t-il qu'il force votre bluff.
